channel.title: Comments on: Maui CoCoNut Porter, Maui Brewing Company, Ep. 107
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Brendan
item.dc:creator: Brendan
item.description: I went to Maui a few Months ago and visited the MBC. They had over 12 beers on tap and the bar features a frost rail to keep your beer cold to the last drop. The CoCoNut porter was my favorite. The Black Pearl and Father Damien was a close second. I'm glad to see CoCoNut Porter available at BevMo, i will have to order some to bring me back to Maui. I visited there every day i was there (8days) to drink, eat or both. A must do if your ever in Maui! I will be making this Porter soon!
item.content:encoded: I went to Maui a few Months ago and visited the MBC. They had over 12 beers on tap and the bar features a frost rail to keep your beer cold to the last drop. The CoCoNut porter was my favorite. The Black Pearl and Father Damien was a close second. I’m glad to see CoCoNut Porter available at BevMo, i will have to order some to bring me back to Maui. I visited there every day i was there (8days) to drink, eat or both. A must do if your ever in Maui! I will be making this Porter soon!

item.title: By: Edmond
item.dc:creator: Edmond
item.description: I love the Coconut porter. I had to bring some back with me last year. Of course I am out now so I think I'll have to order me some more. As for the Black Pearl, well I guess I'll have to dream about that one. I don't see me going to Hawaii any time soon.
item.content:encoded:
I love the Coconut porter. I had to bring some back with me last year. Of course I am out now so I think I’ll have to order me some more.
As for the Black Pearl, well I guess I’ll have to dream about that one. I don’t see me going to Hawaii any time soon.

item.title: By: Sean Inman
item.dc:creator: Sean Inman
item.description: Those are two great beers. Top 10 favorites. Both are awesome with ice cream. Thanks for the link to beerinfo.com too.
item.content:encoded: Those are two great beers. Top 10 favorites. Both are awesome with ice cream. Thanks for the link to beerinfo.com too.
